repository_ssim: St. Catherine's Monastery of the Sinai
titles_tesim: Synaxarium for the whole year, preceded by an introduction and followed by an appendix in different hands and in smaller format
contents_tesim: Synaxarium for the whole year, preceded by an introduction and followed by an appendix in different hands and in smaller format
paracontent_tesim: كمل السنكساري مجموع السنة باشر المسكين الغير مستحق يدعا رهاب بينين سابا الدمشقي وذلك بكنيسة السيدة بدمشق في العشر الاوسط من شهر نيسان سنة ستالف سبعمائه وخمسة وأربعين لأبينا آدم
Attested places:  Church of The Lady, Damascus
full_text_tesim: Knotted vine arched headpiece, with fleur de lis, ascending knots and crosses, red, and black ink throughout; f. 3 v with decorated initials; f. 133v, knotted cross
Vegetative scroll decoration, f. 1r; arabesque design, f. 250r
Variety of marginalia knot motifs throughout; bordered ff. 169v-191r; bordering text, f. 5r, 115v
Preceded by an introduction and followed by an appendix in different hands and in smaller format
Attested places:  Church of The Lady, Damascus
